name: proagentstore
description: Operate ProAgentStore agents and private instances through the user's MCP-authenticated account.

interface.shortDescription: Build and operate ProAgentStore agents through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Create agents, subscribe to agents, run private instances, add knowledge, inspect messages, and manage ProAgentStore runtime state through the deployed MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Create a ProAgentStore agent in my account.
Subscribe to an agent and run my instance.
